A form field for Group Name or Group ID containing the exact text 'compliance-team'.
A form field for Group Label containing the exact text 'Compliance Team'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Nuxeo web interface to create the group.

integrity.description: Verify genuine interaction with the application's user search.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't mock the result in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target group ID is 'compliance-team' and the target group label is 'Compliance Team'. The group must contain exactly two members: 'jsmith' (John Smith) and 'mwilson' (Maria Wilson). The task is performed in the Nuxeo Platform web interface.
